org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping.BasicCassandraPersistentEntity

Packages that use BasicCassandraPersistentEntity
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping
Infrastructure for the Apache Cassandra row-to-object mapping subsystem.

  • Uses of BasicCassandraPersistentEntity in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.mapping

    Cassandra Tuple-specific PersistentEntity for a mapped tuples.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CassandraMappingContext
    Default implementation of a MappingContext for Cassandra using CassandraPersistentEntity and CassandraPersistentProperty as primary abstractions.
